name: Lima Bean Health Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight in cold water.
2. Drain, rinse, and cook in water to cover until tender (about 1 1/2 hours).
3. Drain the beans and mash them.
4. Melt butter in a saucepan and add onion. Sauté for 3 minutes.
5. Add celery and cover; cook until tender.
6. Stir in flour and cook for 2 minutes.
7. Add milk, stirring until thickened.
8. Remove from heat and stir in beaten egg.
9. Add bread crumbs, carrots, salt, pepper, and peanuts.
10. Spoon the mixture into a greased 8 x 4 inch loaf pan.
11. Bake at 375 degrees for 35 - 45 minutes.
12. Arrange cheese slices on top and return to the oven until the cheese melts. Serves 6.
